author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: prod_f32/f64, prod_backward_f32/f64, min_f32/f64, max_f32/f64, cumsum_f32/f64, cumprod_f32/f64, cummin_f32/f64, cummax_f32/f64, logcumsumexp_f32/f64, sum_axis_f64, masked_min_f32/f64, masked_max_f32/f64, has_inf_nan_f32/f64. Threadgroup reduction pattern; use threadgroup shared memory.
